---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for NewsLens
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Description

A clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How should this work? Include any design considerations.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, or references to `design-system.md` specs if relevant.
